data.description: The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references Identification of a Physics-Based Electrical Power Consumption Model for the Unitree G1 Humanoid Arm.
The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references Vision-Language-Action in Robotics: A Survey of Datasets, Benchmarks, and Data Engines.
The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references Robot Trains Robot: Automatic Real-World Policy Adaptation and Learning for Humanoids.
The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references RUKA: Rethinking the Design of Humanoid Hands with Learning.
The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references Modular Robot Control with Motor Primitives.

The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Unscented Kalman Filter for Sensorless Joint Torque Estimation in Humanoid Robots.
Vision-Language-Action in Robotics: A Survey of Datasets, Benchmarks, and Data Engines cites or references The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices.
仿真与现实物理之间的现实鸿沟限制了 RoboGen 等合成数据引擎向真实机器人迁移的效果。
The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references World Action Models: The Next Frontier in Embodied AI.
仿真与现实物理之间的现实鸿沟限制了 MimicGen 等演示增强引擎向真实机器人迁移的效果。
Cycloidal Quasi-Direct Drive Actuator Designs with Learning-based Torque Estimation for Legged Robotics cites or references The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices.
The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references Unified Multi-Rate Model Predictive Control for a Jet-Powered Humanoid Robot.
World Action Models: The Next Frontier in Embodied AI cites or references The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices.
